description: Golden calibration cases for the answer-quality rubric. v0 labels are placeholder machinery — real calibration needs human-annotated cases scored by a real provider (deferred to provider onboarding). See evaluation.md.

cases.name: grounded-answer
cases.input: How many vacation days does the standard policy grant?
cases.output: The standard policy grants 20 vacation days per year.
citations: Policy 4.2: employees accrue 20 vacation days annually.

cases.name: ungrounded-guess
cases.input: What is the parental leave allowance?
cases.output: Parental leave is 6 months at full pay.
citations: Policy 4.2: employees accrue 20 vacation days annually.

cases.name: correct-abstention
cases.input: What is the reimbursement rate for personal vehicle mileage?
cases.output: I don't have enough information in the provided documents to answer that.

cases.name: confident-fabrication
cases.output: The CFO personally approves all overruns above one million dollars.
